Class DistributedMatrixBenchmark

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.benchmarks.benchmark.benchmarks.DistributedMatrixBenchmark
All Implemented Interfaces:
RunnableBenchmark
Direct Known Subclasses:
DistributedMatrixBenchmark_jmhType_B1
@AutoService(RunnableBenchmark.class) public class DistributedMatrixBenchmark extends Object implements RunnableBenchmark
Benchmark for distributed matrix operations.
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

      Description copied from interface: RunnableBenchmark
